summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UCIM WebGL visualization app. All major features working correctly including WebGL rendering with bloom post-processing, 16-second animation cycle, 8 node labels, mobile CSS fallback, and responsive design.
passed_tests: WebGL canvas renders with bloom post-processing (UnrealBloomPass)
All 8 node labels visible with correct text content
Glass-morphism labels with backdrop-filter and cyan left-border accent
Central gold node visible with bloom glow and energy halo
Orbital gold nodes (8 distinct geometric primitives) visible and rotating
Cyan connection lines from center to nodes with bloom effect
Cross-connection lines between orbital nodes visible
Hex grid substrate with animated cyan energy ripple (custom GLSL shader)
Gold particles drifting with twinkle effect (custom GLSL shader)
16-second animation loop: assemble->hold->dissolve->restart
CSS fallback renders correctly on mobile with multi-layer central element
Animated SVG connections (18 lines) in mobile fallback
Gold particles (24) with drift animation in mobile fallback
Page header with 'Sarif Consulting' eyebrow (cyan) and Space Grotesk font
Film grain overlay visible with subtle texture
Container maintains 16:9 aspect ratio
Zero border-radius requirement met on all elements
No JavaScript console errors
Exactly 8 labels (StrictMode double-label fix working)
Energy halo ring visible around central node
Mobile viewport detection and fallback triggering
Responsive typography and layout on mobile
